metadata.description: Open-source agent skills, organized by category.

plugins.name: mobile-development
plugins.description: Skills for shipping and monetizing mobile apps — Google Play onboarding and RevenueCat setup.

plugins.name: analytics
plugins.description: Skills for measurement & analytics setup — Google Analytics 4 (GA4) onboarding across web, Android, and iOS.

plugins.name: software-engineering
plugins.description: Web engineering quality & security — accessibility (a11y) audits and OWASP-based security/vulnerability audits.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Writing & content style — humanizing AI text, tone shifting (empathetic, formal/professional), and legal-document drafting.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Marketing — web SEO audits (technical, on-page, structured data, Core Web Vitals).

plugins.name: ecommerce
plugins.description: E-commerce — Shopify store onboarding (products, collections, payments, shipping, launch).
